title: Select
description: Accessible single-value selector with a dropdown panel. Supports search, grouping, icons and the standard visual modes.

basic.title: Basic usage
basic.desc: Simple selector with static options and a placeholder.
basic.label: Country

searchable.title: Searchable
searchable.desc: Enable searchable to show a search input inside the panel.
searchable.label: Language

grouped.title: Grouped options
grouped.desc: Options sharing the same group property are rendered under a heading.
grouped.label: Language

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Three sizes to match form density.

states.title: States
states.desc: Loading, disabled and error with inline feedback.

props.modelValue: Selected value (v-model). null when nothing is selected.
props.options: Option list \{ value, label, description?, icon?, disabled?, group? \}.
props.label: Visible label above the field.
props.placeholder: Text shown when there is no selected value.
props.color: Semantic color for focus and accent.
props.radius: Corner radius of the trigger and panel.
props.clearable: Shows an X button to clear the selection.
props.searchable: Shows a search input inside the panel.
props.loading: Shows a spinner instead of the chevron.
props.fullWidth: Applies w-full to the control root.
props.iconLeft: Icon rendered to the left of the trigger.
props.panelWidth: Calculates panel width from the trigger or its content.
props.name: HTML name attribute for form submission.
props.ariaLabel: Accessible name when there is no visible label.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the value changes (syncs v-model).
